# ts-lib-template

> One-line description

ESM-only TypeScript library. Node >= 24, zero runtime dependencies. Built with tsdown, tested with Vitest, linted with Biome, released with semantic-release.

## Public API

<!-- List exported functions and types from src/index.ts -->

## Install

```
pnpm add ts-lib-template
```

## Quick Example

```typescript
import {} from 'ts-lib-template';
```

## Documentation

- Full docs: https://github.com/axelhamil/ts-lib-template
- Detailed API: llms-full.txt
